project_summary: Heuristic proposition fallback generated from evidence units.

propositions.text: Firstly, it should be able to record the customer's name and contact details.
Secondly, we need to track the product or service being sold, including its ID and description.
Additionally, the price per unit and total sale amount must be captured accurately.
It should also log the date and time of the sale, along with any special notes or comments from the Salesman.
This will help us keep track of sales trends and customer interactions.
The system should also log the IP address and timestamp for each entry to maintain audit trails.
Authorized users can amend or alter claim entries if needed, which is crucial for correcting errors or updating claims as necessary.
When adding a new staff member, the system should check for existing entries based on VSP Name and Staff Code.
If there's a duplicate, it should generate a message alerting the user.
However, if the user needs to save this new entry despite the duplication, they should be allowed to do so.
The principles of the vouchers and health care services should be defined in our PDS, including quality standards and monitoring measures.
If a claim (treatment form) status needs to be rejected, users should mark it as such and send it back to VSP for review.
For voucher allocation, the system should be able to allocate relevant vouchers based on the number required by the distributor.
The system should print a receipt document accordingly.
Additionally, when allocating vouchers, the system must consider the distributor's name and the sales man involved, along with the date of distribution.
Each voucher allocated should include its number and batch number.
The reason for referral should be populated automatically from the Referral Master.
This will help us understand the issues better and improve our processes.
For adding new salesmen to the Team Master, only system admins should be able to do this.
They can create any number of individual users under existing user groups.
It should capture everything that is discussed on the VSP Master Information screen, where we enter these terms.
At the same time, it should In-Activate that VSP.
